case_title: KING AMERICAN AMBULANCE, INC. VS. LORIN FRENCH

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $361.57 FILED BY KING AMERICAN AMBULANCE, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT FRENCH, LORIN AKA: LEE L. FRENCH,  AKA:  LORIN FRENCH, JR. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-12-2012 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $50.00) SERVED AUG-01-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT FRENCH, LORIN AKA: LEE L. FRENCH,  AKA:  LORIN FRENCH, JR.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF KING AMERICAN AMBULANCE, INC.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE, PER PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY JOHN LEGASPI--PUBLIC INFO. OFFICER. PLAINTIFF DID NOT STIPULATE FOR PRO TEM JUDGE TO HEAR HIS CASE TODAY AND THEN HE CHANGED HIS MIND AND DISMISSED THE CASE. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: BETSY JOHNSON. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
